name: ACE Boundary Examples
description: Examples for CLARIXO ACE showing the boundary between keyword-based topic projection and attribution-based material classification.
principle: Classification authority should belong to attribution structure, not keywords.

input.message: This article mentions governance, legal, finance, healthcare, policy, security, training, evidence, audit, and risk.

expected.reason: Domain keywords alone may support topic projection but should not trigger Material Review.

input.message: AI governance systems should preserve responsibility attribution, evidence continuity, auditability, and lifecycle accountability.

expected.reason: A conceptual governance article can be understood as governance-related without becoming a structured material review case.

input.message: This payload contains an explicit governance policy material object for review.

expected.reason: The structured material object provides attribution support for Material Review.

input.message: This text discusses investment risk, liquidity, portfolio exposure, regulatory reporting, insurance, and market volatility.

expected.reason: Financial vocabulary alone should not trigger financial Material Review.

input.message: This payload contains a financial risk investment material object.

expected.reason: The explicit material object supports financial material classification.

cases.title: Runtime continuity issue without material object

input.message: The second agent continues from the first agent's conclusion even though the evidence changed and responsibility was not rebound.

expected.reason: The input describes inherited instability and responsibility rebinding risk, but does not provide a material object.

input.message: 这篇文章提到了治理、法律、金融、医疗、政策、安全、培训、证据、审计和风险，但没有结构化材料对象。

expected.reason: Chinese domain keywords alone should not trigger Material Review.

input.message: 这个输入包含一个明确的治理政策材料对象，需要进行材料审查。

expected.reason: The explicit structured object supports Material Review.
